req.title: Appointment scheduling
req.statement: A patient shall schedule an appointment at least 24 hours in advance during provider's available slots.
error_pathways: 422 when slot unavailable or in past

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-024 specifies temporal and availability constraints on appointment scheduling. The requirement mandates: (1) minimum 24-hour advance booking window, (2) slot must be within provider's available times, (3) successful creation triggers provider notification, (4) 422 error for unavailable or past slots. Test suite covers happy path (EP: valid future slot), negative paths (NEG: past slot, unavailable slot), and boundary cases (BVA: exactly 24h boundary, 23h59m boundary). Tests use deterministic fixtures and frozen time to ensure idempotency.

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot
trace: R-HLT-024: 24-hour advance requirement satisfied (120 hours advance)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from freezegun import freeze_time

@freeze_time('2025-02-10T10:00:00Z')
def test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot(auth_token, base_url):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    payload = {
        'provider_id': 'DR_001',
        'slot_time': '2025-02-15T14:00:00Z',
        'patient_id': 'PAT_001'
    }
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/appointments', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert 'appointment_id' in body
    assert body['status'] == 'confirmed'
    assert body['slot_time'] == '2025-02-15T14:00:00Z'
    assert body['provider_notified'] is True

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_slot_in_past
actions: inspect response status and error detail

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_slot_unavailable
preconditions: slot 2025-02-15T14:00:00Z is already booked by another patient

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24_hours_advance
trace: R-HLT-024: boundary value - minimum advance window (24h exactly)
R-HLT-024: at lower bound of valid advance window

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_less_than_24_hours_advance
trace: R-HLT-024: boundary value - just below minimum window
